{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "powershell.exe was executed with a hidden window (-w 1) and an encoded command (-enc), which are common techniques used by malware for obfuscation and evasion. The parent process wsmprovhost.exe is legitimate but often used for remote execution, which can be abused.",
  "indicators": [
    "powershell.exe",
    "-w 1",
    "-enc",
    "encoded command",
    "hidden window",
